name_cn:
CALYPSO_Tan matte gold buckle
Made from imported Italian suede, soft and delicate to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. No other pockets, allowing for a free and easy carry!
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153
